mapper.sql: SELECT a.appointment_id, a.appointment_no, a.tenant_id, a.house_id, a.project_id, a.appointment_date, a.time_slot, a.visitor_name, a.visitor_phone, a.id_card, a.appointment_time, a.appointment_source, a.visitor_count, a.appointment_status, a.cancel_reason, a.confirm_by, a.confirm_time, a.cancel_time, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, u.nickname as user_name, h.house_code, h.house_no, p.project_name, p.address as project_address FROM hz_appointment a LEFT JOIN hz_user u ON a.tenant_id = u.user_id AND u.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN hz_house h ON a.house_id = h.house_id AND h.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN hz_project p ON a.project_id = p.project_id AND p.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT a.appointment_id, a.appointment_no, a.tenant_id, a.house_id, a.project_id, a.appointment_date, a.time_slot, a.visitor_name, a.visitor_phone, a.id_card, a.appointment_time, a.appointment_source, a.visitor_count, a.appointment_status, a.cancel_reason, a.confirm_by, a.confirm_time, a.cancel_time, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, h.house_no, p.project_name FROM hz_appointment a LEFT JOIN hz_house h ON a.house_id = h.house_id AND h.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN hz_project p ON a.project_id = p.project_id AND p.del_flag = '0' WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.tenant_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
